Cluster Effect Mockups

Comparing individual tile effects vs polygon fill, plus localized wobble options

Individual Tile Effects vs Polygon Fill
VS
Individual Tile Glow
Perf ★★★★☆
Recommended
filter: drop-shadow Each tile glows independently. Works with any cluster shape. GPU accelerated.
Polygon Fill
Perf ★★★☆☆
complex path Requires computing convex hull or outline. Expensive for L-shapes or gaps.
Tile Effect Variations
Pulse Scale
Perf ★★★★★
transform: scale Simple, performant. Tiles grow/shrink together.
Border Pulse
Perf ★★★★☆
::after border Pulsing outline on each tile. Good visibility without obscuring.
Shimmer Sweep
Perf ★★★★☆
pseudo-element Light sweep across tiles. Elegant, game-like polish.
Color Intensity
Perf ★★★★★
filter: brightness Subtle color boost. Minimal but noticeable.
Localized Cluster Wobble
Subtle Shake
Perf ★★★★★
Recommended
translate ±1px Gentle vibration. Draws attention without distraction.
Wave Motion
Perf ★★★★★
staggered delay Sequential wave through tiles. Organic, fluid feel.
Jelly Squish
Perf ★★★★☆
scale X/Y Squash and stretch. Playful, cartoon-like.
Micro Rotate
Perf ★★★★★
rotate ±1deg Tiny rotation. Subtle unease, anticipation.
Breathe
Perf ★★★★★
scale + opacity Slow, calming pulse. Less urgent, more ambient.
Wobble + Glow
Perf ★★★★☆
Best Impact
combined Shake + glow together. Maximum visibility, still performant.
Recommendations
Use Case Effect Why
Cluster Ready to Clear Subtle Shake + Glow Draws eye, shows it's tappable
About to Clear (tapped) Intensity + Scale Brief flash before particles
Big Cluster (5+) Jelly + Strong Glow Celebrates the achievement
Danger Zone Cluster Fast Wobble Urgency, matches danger state
